questions.prompt: The lights went out because the ____ was off in the whole building.
questions.explain: 停電時要用 power 表示「電力」。

questions.prompt: We stayed home ____ it was raining heavily.
questions.explain: 待在家裡的原因是雨下很大，所以用 because。

questions.prompt: The cookies ____ this morning, so they still smell great.
questions.explain: 餅乾是「被做出來」，用被動語態 were made。

questions.prompt: Everyone has the ____ to help others in some way.
questions.explain: 這裡的 power 是「能力、力量」，不是電力。

questions.prompt: Kelly isn’t ready, and ____ is her partner.
questions.explain: 句首否定附和要用 neither + be動詞/助動詞 + 主詞，所以是 neither is her partner。

questions.prompt: This history ____ is popular because the teacher tells stories in class.
questions.explain: history course 是歷史課程，所以選 course。

questions.prompt: It’s too dark in here. Please turn ____.
questions.explain: turn on 是可分片語，受詞若是代名詞 it，一定要放中間，所以是 turn it on。

questions.prompt: ____ Mom was cooking, I was setting the table.
questions.explain: while 常用來表示兩個持續中的動作同時進行，所以用 While。

questions.prompt: We followed a different ____ home because the main road was too crowded.
questions.explain: 這裡 course 不是課程，而是「路線」。

questions.prompt: This is the shop ____ I bought the bag.
questions.explain: shop 是地點，而且後面 I bought the bag 結構完整，所以用 where 表示「在那家店」。若要用 which，必須改成 which I bought the bag in 或 in which I bought the bag。
